_meta.purpose: Disposition ledger for unknown-device triage. One doc per asset.id (idempotent _id), written by _reindex from m_26_14-assets through the m_26_14-asset-triage-classify pipeline. Holds the computed m_26_14.triage.* disposition + evidence and the case-routing state (proposed -> routed -> actioned -> closed). The m_26_14-unknown-device-triage workflow reads this ledger to open disposition-specific Kibana Cases and records routing state here. The canonical store m_26_14-assets is NEVER mutated by triage — keeping the classification out of the continuous entity-resolution transform's latest-wins path (see project_demo_data_sources clobber note). host.name and disposition are keyword for aggregation/enrich.
_meta.refresh_cmd: POST _reindex {"source":{"index":"m_26_14-assets","query":{"term":{"asset.managed":false}}},"dest":{"index":"m_26_14-asset-triage","pipeline":"m_26_14-asset-triage-classify"}}  (add managed:true OR alert-flagged hosts to also surface compromised managed assets)
